seoTitle: Myrtle Park vs Mystery Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Myrtle Park and Mystery Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Myrtle Park vs Mystery Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Myrtle Park and Mystery Bay.
heading: Myrtle Park vs Mystery Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Myrtle Park, New South Wales and Mystery Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mystery Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Myrtle Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Myrtle Park or Mystery Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Myrtle Park has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Mystery Bay scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Myrtle Park scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Mystery Bay scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Myrtle Park or Mystery Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mystery Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
